description: Self-issued testnet USDC-code asset for demoing takumi_pay. Not affiliated with Circle's real testnet USDC issuer — a separate, independent SAC deployment created purely so we can mint unlimited demo balances without depending on an external faucet.

verifiedEndToEnd.note: create_transaction invoked against takumi_pay using this token; transfer + TransactionCreated events both fired.

pointDepositAllowlisted.note: This SAC is registered as an AllowedPointToken on takumi_pay v1 (required by deposit_points, a separate allowlist from merchant tokens at the time). Owner call add_allowed_point_token(deployer, SAC). Superseded on v2 — see allowedPaymentTokenV2 below.

pointDepositVerifiedEndToEnd.note: deposit_points invoked against takumi_pay v1 using this token via the real mobile code (resolveStellarSacId + buildDepositPointsArgs + invokeSorobanContract); get_point_deposit read back wallet_address/token/ref_id/amount all matching — the exact fields the API's verifyPointDeposit checks.

allowedPaymentTokenV2.note: On takumi_pay v2, AllowedPointToken was merged into a single AllowedPaymentToken allowlist that gates create_transaction, process_merchant_payment, AND deposit_points. This SAC is registered as an AllowedPaymentToken via owner call add_allowed_payment_token(owner, SAC); verified with is_allowed_payment_token == true.
